member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckContext
member.summary: Provides context about the currently executing health check.
member.remarks: Passed to so implementations can inspect the registration metadata (name, tags, failure status) when producing a result.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckContext.Registration
member.summary: Gets the registration associated with the executing health check.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckContext.#ctor(JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The registration metadata for this check.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration
member.summary: Describes a health check registration including its name, factory, tags, timeout, and failure status.
member.remarks: Registrations are immutable after is sealed during service configuration. Tags control which endpoints include the check (e.g., liveness vs. readiness).

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration.Name
member.summary: Gets the unique name of the health check.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration.Factory
member.summary: Gets the factory that creates the instance.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration.FailureStatus
member.summary: Gets or sets the status to report when the check throws an unhandled exception. Defaults to .

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration.Tags
member.summary: Gets the tags associated with this check. Tags determine endpoint inclusion (e.g., "live" for liveness, "ready" for readiness).

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional timeout for this individual check. When , the default timeout from is used.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration.#ctor(System.String,System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,JG.HealthKit.IHealthCheck},JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus,System.Collections.Generic.ISet{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The unique name of the health check.
A factory that produces the instance.
The status to report on unhandled exceptions.
The tags for endpoint filtering.
An optional per-check timeout.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult
member.summary: The result of a single health check execution.
member.remarks: This is a value type to minimize allocations on the hot path. Use the static factory methods , , and to create instances. This type is immutable and thread-safe.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Status
member.summary: Gets the aggregate status of the health check.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Description
member.summary: Gets a human-readable description of the check result.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Duration
member.summary: Gets the wall-clock duration of the check execution.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception that caused the check to fail, if any.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Data
member.summary: Gets optional key-value data associated with the check result.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Healthy(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a result representing a healthy component.
member.param: An optional description of the healthy state.
Optional key-value data to include in the result.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Degraded(System.String,System.Exception,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a result representing a degraded component.
member.param: A description of the degraded condition.
An optional exception associated with the degraded state.
Optional key-value data to include in the result.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.Unhealthy(System.String,System.Exception,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a result representing an unhealthy component.
member.param: A description of the failure.
An optional exception associated with the failure.
Optional key-value data to include in the result.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.WithDuration(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Returns a new with the specified duration applied.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.op_Equality(JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult,JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult)
member.summary: Equality operator.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult.op_Inequality(JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult,JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult)
member.summary: Inequality operator.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckTags
member.summary: Well-known tag constants for health check endpoint filtering.

member.name: F:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckTags.Live
member.summary: Tag for checks included in the liveness probe endpoint (/health/live).

member.name: F:JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckTags.Ready
member.summary: Tag for checks included in the readiness probe endpoint (/health/ready). This is the default tag applied when no tags are specified.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthReport
member.summary: An aggregated report containing the results of all executed health checks.
member.remarks: The overall is the worst (highest ordinal) status across all entries. This type is immutable and thread-safe once constructed.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthReport.Status
member.summary: Gets the aggregate health status across all check entries.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthReport.TotalDuration
member.summary: Gets the total wall-clock time taken to execute all checks.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthReport.Entries
member.summary: Gets the individual check results keyed by registration name.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthReport.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult},JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The individual check results keyed by name.
The aggregate status.
The total execution duration.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthReport.Empty
member.summary: Creates an empty healthy report with zero duration.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus
member.summary: Represents the health status of a component or the overall system.
member.remarks: Values are ordered by severity. is the best state, is the worst. Aggregate status is determined by taking the maximum value across all individual check results.

member.name: F:JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus.Healthy
member.summary: The component is working normally.

member.name: F:JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus.Degraded
member.summary: The component is functioning but with reduced capability or elevated resource usage.

member.name: F:JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus.Unhealthy
member.summary: The component is not functioning and the service cannot handle requests.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.IHealthCheck
member.summary: Defines a health check that can report the health of a component or subsystem.
member.remarks: Implementations must be thread-safe when registered as singletons. All I/O operations should be async and respect the provided .

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.IHealthCheck.CheckAsync(JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs the health check and returns a result indicating the component's status.
member.param: Context containing the check's registration metadata.
A token to observe for cancellation requests.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.IHealthReportFormatter
member.summary: Formats a for HTTP response output.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.IHealthReportFormatter.ContentType
member.summary: Gets the content type produced by this formatter (e.g., application/json).

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.IHealthReportFormatter.WriteAsync(System.IO.Stream,JG.HealthKit.HealthReport,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes the health report to the specified stream.
member.param: The output stream to write to.
The health report to format.
A token to observe for cancellation.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.IStartupHealthSignal
member.summary: Signals application startup completion to health check probes.
member.remarks: Inject this interface and call once all initialization is complete. Until then, the startup health check reports , which prevents Kubernetes readiness probes from routing traffic to a partially initialized instance. This type is thread-safe.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.IStartupHealthSignal.IsReady
member.summary: Gets whether the application has signaled startup completion.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.IStartupHealthSignal.MarkReady
member.summary: Marks the application as ready. This is a one-way operation and cannot be reversed.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.DatabaseHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that verifies database connectivity by opening a connection and optionally executing a test query.
member.remarks: Uses the caller-provided factory so there is no dependency on a specific database provider. Each invocation creates, opens, and disposes its own connection. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.DatabaseHealthCheck.#ctor(System.Func{System.Data.Common.DbConnection},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: A factory that creates a new .
An optional SQL query to execute after opening the connection (e.g., "SELECT 1"). When , only connection open is verified.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.DelegateHealthCheck
member.summary: Wraps a delegate as an implementation.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.DelegateHealthCheck.#ctor(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask{JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The delegate to invoke when the check executes.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.DiskSpaceHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that monitors available disk space against configured thresholds.
member.remarks: Supports three-state reporting: healthy when above the warning threshold, degraded when between warning and critical, unhealthy when below critical. Completes synchronously (no I/O), so returns directly. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.DiskSpaceHealthCheck.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The drive or mount point to check (e.g., "C:\" on Windows, "/" on Linux).
The minimum free bytes before reporting unhealthy.
The free bytes threshold below which the check reports degraded. Must be greater than or equal to . When equal to , the degraded state is effectively disabled.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.HttpHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that verifies an HTTP dependency is reachable and returning success status codes.
member.remarks: Uses for proper lifecycle management. Only reads response headers (does not buffer the body) to minimize overhead. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.HttpHealthCheck.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,System.String,System.Uri)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The HTTP client factory for creating clients.
The named HTTP client identifier.
The URI to send a GET request to.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.MemoryHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that monitors managed memory usage against configured thresholds.
member.remarks: Reports GC heap allocated bytes along with generation collection counts. Supports three-state reporting with degraded and unhealthy thresholds. Completes synchronously (no I/O). Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.MemoryHealthCheck.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The allocated byte count above which the check reports unhealthy.
The allocated byte count above which the check reports degraded. Must be less than or equal to . When equal to , the degraded state is effectively disabled.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.StartupHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that gates readiness on application startup completion.
member.remarks: Reports until is called. This prevents Kubernetes readiness probes from routing traffic before initialization is complete. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.StartupHealthCheck.#ctor(JG.HealthKit.IStartupHealthSignal)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The startup signal to observe.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Checks.TcpHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that verifies TCP connectivity to a remote host and port.
member.remarks: Opens a TCP connection to the specified endpoint and reports healthy on success. The connection is immediately closed after verification. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Checks.TcpHealthCheck.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The hostname or IP address to connect to.
The TCP port number.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Endpoints.HealthEndpointHandler
member.summary: Handles HTTP requests for health check endpoints, coordinating the runner, cache, and formatter to produce JSON responses.
member.remarks: Designed as a singleton. The liveness and readiness endpoints run different subsets of health checks based on their tags. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Endpoints.HealthEndpointHandler.HandleLivenessAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Handles the liveness probe endpoint. Runs checks tagged with "live". Returns 200 when healthy or degraded, 503 when unhealthy.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Endpoints.HealthEndpointHandler.HandleReadinessAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Handles the readiness probe endpoint. Runs checks tagged with "ready". Returns 200 when healthy or degraded, 503 when unhealthy.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering built-in health checks on .

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddSqlServer(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Adds a SQL Server TCP connectivity check by parsing the connection string to extract the server host and port.
member.param: The options instance.
A SQL Server connection string.
An optional name for the check. Defaults to sqlserver:host:port.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".
An optional per-check timeout.
member.exception: is null, empty, or missing a server key.
member.remarks: This performs a TCP-level connectivity check to the SQL Server endpoint. For a full query-level check, use with a factory instead.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddHttpDependency(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Adds an HTTP dependency health check that sends a GET request to the specified URL.
member.param: The options instance.
A unique name identifying the HTTP dependency.
The URL to send a health check request to.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".
An optional per-check timeout.
member.exception: is null or whitespace, or is not a valid absolute URI.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddDiskSpace(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.Int64,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Adds a disk space health check that monitors available free space on the specified drive.
member.param: The options instance.
The minimum free bytes below which the check reports unhealthy.
Optional threshold below which the check reports degraded. Must be greater than or equal to .
The drive or mount point to check. Defaults to the OS root drive (C:\ on Windows, / on Linux).
An optional name for the check. Defaults to disk-space.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".
member.exception: is negative, or is less than .

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddMemoryCheck(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.Int64,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Adds a memory health check that monitors managed heap allocation.
member.param: The options instance.
The allocated byte count above which the check reports unhealthy. Defaults to 1 GB.
The allocated byte count above which the check reports degraded. Must be less than or equal to . Defaults to (degraded state disabled).
An optional name for the check. Defaults to memory.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddTcp(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Adds a TCP connectivity health check to the specified host and port.
member.param: The options instance.
A unique name for the check.
The hostname or IP address.
The TCP port number (1–65535).
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".
An optional per-check timeout.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddDatabaseCheck(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.String,System.Func{System.Data.Common.DbConnection},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Adds a database health check using a caller-provided factory.
member.param: The options instance.
A unique name for the check.
A factory that creates a new . The connection is opened and disposed on each health check invocation.
An optional SQL query to execute after opening the connection (e.g., "SELECT 1").
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".
An optional per-check timeout.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptionsExtensions.AddStartupCheck(JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Adds a startup health check that gates readiness until is called.
member.param: The options instance.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready".
member.remarks: After calling this method, inject into your startup logic and call when initialization is complete. The readiness endpoint will return unhealthy until then.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the HealthKit health check system.
member.remarks: Use this class within AddHealthKit to register health checks, configure caching, timeouts, and endpoint paths. Once sealed during service registration, the options become immutable.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.CacheDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration for which health check results are cached. Set to (the default) to disable caching.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.DefaultTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the default timeout applied to individual health checks that do not specify their own timeout. Defaults to 30 seconds.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.LivenessPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL path for the liveness probe endpoint. Defaults to /health/live.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.ReadinessPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL path for the readiness probe endpoint. Defaults to /health/ready.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.Registrations
member.summary: Gets the list of registered health check registrations.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.CheckTypes
member.summary: Gets the list of check types that need to be registered in DI.

member.name: P:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.RequiresStartupSignal
member.summary: Gets or sets whether a startup signal is required.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.AddCheck(System.String,JG.HealthKit.IHealthCheck,JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Registers a health check instance with the specified name.
member.param: A unique name for the health check.
The health check instance.
The status to report on unhandled exceptions.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready" if not specified.
An optional per-check timeout override.
member.exception: Options have been sealed after service registration.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.AddCheck(System.String,System.Func{System.IServiceProvider,JG.HealthKit.IHealthCheck},JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Registers a health check using a factory delegate resolved from the service provider.
member.param: A unique name for the health check.
A factory that receives and returns an .
The status to report on unhandled exceptions.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready" if not specified.
An optional per-check timeout override.
member.exception: Options have been sealed after service registration.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.AddCheck``1(System.String,JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Registers a health check type that is resolved from the service provider. The type is automatically registered in DI as transient if not already registered.
member.param: A unique name for the health check.
The status to report on unhandled exceptions.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready" if not specified.
An optional per-check timeout override.
member.exception: Options have been sealed after service registration.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.AddCheck(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask{JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckResult}},JG.HealthKit.HealthStatus,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Registers an inline health check using a delegate.
member.param: A unique name for the health check.
The delegate to execute as the health check.
The status to report on unhandled exceptions.
Tags for endpoint filtering. Defaults to "ready" if not specified.
An optional per-check timeout override.
member.exception: Options have been sealed after service registration.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.GetLiveRegistrations
member.summary: Gets the pre-filtered list of registrations for the liveness endpoint.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.GetReadyRegistrations
member.summary: Gets the pre-filtered list of registrations for the readiness endpoint.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions.Seal
member.summary: Seals the options to prevent further modifications. Called during service registration.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Internal.ConnectionStringParser
member.summary: Parses SQL Server connection strings to extract host and port for TCP health checks.
member.remarks: Handles standard SQL Server connection string formats: Server=host, Server=host,port, Server=tcp:host,port, Data Source=host\instance. Defaults to port 1433 when not specified.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Internal.ConnectionStringParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the host and port from a SQL Server connection string.
member.param: The SQL Server connection string.
member.exception: The connection string is null, empty, or missing a server key.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Internal.HealthCheckCache
member.summary: Thread-safe TTL cache for health check reports, preventing check storms under load.
member.remarks: Uses a double-check locking pattern with to ensure only one execution occurs per cache key when the cache expires. The fast path (cache hit) is lock-free. This type is thread-safe and designed for singleton use.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Internal.HealthCheckCache.#ctor(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The duration to cache results. Use to disable caching.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Internal.HealthCheckCache.GetOrRunAsync(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask{JG.HealthKit.HealthReport}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a cached report or executes the factory to produce a fresh one.
member.param: The cache key (e.g., "live" or "ready").
The factory to produce a report on cache miss.
A token to observe for cancellation.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Internal.HealthCheckRunner
member.summary: Executes health check registrations concurrently and aggregates results into a .
member.remarks: Each check runs with its own timeout (or the default from ). Exceptions are caught and converted to results. This type is thread-safe and designed for use as a singleton.

member.name: M:JG.HealthKit.Internal.HealthCheckRunner.RunAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{JG.HealthKit.HealthCheckRegistration},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs all specified health check registrations and returns an aggregated report.
member.param: The checks to execute.
A token to observe for cancellation.

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Internal.StartupHealthSignal
member.summary: Thread-safe implementation of .

member.name: T:JG.HealthKit.Reporting.JsonHealthReportFormatter
member.summary: Formats a as JSON using for zero-allocation serialization.
member.remarks: Produces a compact JSON document with status, total duration, and per-check entries. Exception details are intentionally excluded from the output for security. This type is thread-safe and stateless.

member.name: T:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.HealthKitEndpointExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for mapping HealthKit endpoints on the ASP.NET Core routing pipeline.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.HealthKitEndpointExtensions.MapHealthKit(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps the HealthKit liveness and readiness probe endpoints.
member.param: The endpoint route builder.
member.remarks: By default, maps GET /health/live and GET /health/ready. Paths are configurable via and .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HealthKitServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering HealthKit services in the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HealthKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHealthKit(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{JG.HealthKit.HealthKitOptions})
member.summary: Adds HealthKit health check services to the specified .
member.param: The service collection to add services to.
A delegate to configure .
